title: microlicia rotundifolia
intro: Microlicia rotundifolia, also known as the "round-leaved Microlicia," is a species of plant that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to Brazil, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The health benefits of Microlicia rotundifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit antiviral properties. Microlicia rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
